name: Rapacious Kiss
outcome: [AttackerName] long tongues deeply invade [TargetName]'s mouth, two lovingly coil around [TargetHisOrHer] tongue, massaging it and squeezing it, while two of her other tongues tease every corner of [TargetHisOrHer] mouth, and the fifth tongue teasingly caresses the back of [TargetName]'s throat, and [TargetHisOrHer] body only quivers with bliss.
miss: [AttackerName] long tongues deeply invade [TargetName]'s mouth, but [TargetName] manages to endure the mind melting kiss!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] gasps with desire as [TargetHeOrShe] gulps down more of [AttackerName]'s venomous aphrodisiac saliva, heat flushing [TargetHisOrHer] entire body with need.
